homeInfo.title: Audio Quality Evaluation
homeInfo.message:
Welcome to this audio quality evaluation test.

You will listen to 11 audio samples and answer 2 questions about each one.
Please use headphones and ensure you are in a quiet environment.

For each question, rate the audio on a scale from 1 (worst) to 5 (best).

Click the button below when you are ready to begin.

questions.name: Sample 1
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: solo acoustic nylon string guitar playing in a fingerstyle Brazilian bossa nova style.

0:
How correct is the description of the audio excerpt? Consider a correct caption to not have any information absent from the audio. Use the worst score if all the information in the caption is absent from the audio, and use the best score if all the information in the caption is present in the audio.

1 - completely incorrect
2 - mostly incorrect
3 - somewhat correct
4 - mostly correct
5 - completely correct
1:
How complete is the description of the audio excerpt? Consider a complete caption to have all relevant information concerning genre, mood, and instrumentation of the audio. Use the worst score if the caption does not have any relevant information on these aspects for the audio, and the best score if the caption contains all relevant information on these aspects for the audio.

1 - incomplete
2 - mostly incomplete
3 - somewhat complete
4 - mostly complete
5 - complete

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This AI-assisted EDM track features a male vocalist singing melodically while a keyboard plays the main melody over an energetic electronic drum beat. The piece creates a lively atmosphere that fits well as background music for a nightclub or dance club setting.

questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: An instrumental track with a distinct Latin influence features a driving percussion rhythm supported by a prominent bass drum. A synthesizer carries the melody while a high-pitched male voice sings, creating a groovy and danceable atmosphere reminiscent of late 1980s New Wave and electro-funk styles.

questions.name: Sample 4
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This track features a slow, ambient soundscape driven by ethereal choir vocals that create a hypnotic and meditative atmosphere. Although the metadata suggests various electronic subgenres, the prominent voice instrumentation and lack of spoken lyrics emphasize an immersive listening experience. The subtle rhythm supports these vocal layers to establish a truly captivating mood for the listener.

questions.name: Sample 9
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This energetic instrumental track blends strong electronic influences with a driving, fast-paced rhythm centered on synthesizers and a drum machine. While the beat creates an intense, dark atmosphere suitable for a nightclub or rave setting, the overall mood leans towards a party vibe rather than pure industrial tension. The repetitive structure maintains high momentum throughout, making it a dance-focused piece designed to be immersive in a club environment.

questions.name: About You
questions.description: Please tell us about your musical background.

fields.label: How many years of musical experience do you have?
Please describe your musical experience (instruments played, training, listening habits, etc.)
fields.placeholder: e.g. I've played piano for 10 years and studied music theory in college...
